description: city in Pitt County, North Carolina, United States
description_wiki: Greenville ( GREEN-vil; locally  GREEN-vəl) is the county seat of and the most populous city in Pitt County, North Carolina, United States.

African Americans, also known as Black Americans and formerly called Afro-Americans, are an American racial and ethnic group who, as defined by the United States census, consists of Americans who have ancestry from "any of the Black racial groups of Africa".

aliases: history of racial segregation in the United States
description: race based restrictions in American society
description_wiki: Facilities and services such as housing, healthcare, education, employment, and transportation have been systematically separated in the United States based on racial categorizations.
